  <entry>
    <id>tag:github.com,2008:Repository/633927609/0.121.17</id>
    <updated>2026-06-16T16:59:17Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/releases/tag/0.121.17"/>
    <title>0.121.17</title>
    <content type="html"><h2><a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/compare/0.121.16...0.121.17">0.121.17</a> (2026-06-16)</h2>
<h3>Bug Fixes</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>docker:</strong> bump pinned Python to 3.14 to match the Alpine base image (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/9769" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/9769/hovercard">#9769</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/24fc5be1ae645cbe6ecf0f06238ea6a360ad7866">24fc5be</a>)</li>
<li><strong>docker:</strong> unpin Python minor by default so Alpine drift can't break the build (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/9771" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/9771/hovercard">#9771</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/c69ef40c611c7b6b83b5e6118c7907e411f0d07b">c69ef40</a>)</li>
<li><strong>matchers:</strong> drop stranded list markers in RAGAS context-relevance segmentation (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/9767" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/9767/hovercard">#9767</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/b06eb885191ec47e7b5eada1d89c00d9d304949c">b06eb88</a>)</li>
<li><strong>sanitizer:</strong> stop over-redacting benign url values that mention a credential keyword (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/9764" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/9764/hovercard">#9764</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/77abc5e6131191128b4ecb3de41a6cceae5b0d65">77abc5e</a>)</li>
</ul></content>
    <author>
      <name>promptfoobot[bot]</name>
    </author>

  </entry>

    <content type="html"><h2><a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/compare/0.121.15...0.121.16">0.121.16</a> (2026-06-16)</h2>
<h3>Features</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>providers:</strong> add Claude Fable and Mythos support (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/9671" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/9671/hovercard">#9671</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/09435af291d953e33e5e7f8813e37925a41a9f93">09435af</a>)</li>
<li><strong>redteam:</strong> publish all four promptfoo skills to the Claude Cod
